name: Vida
tagline: Clone yourself. Let AI do the work before you ask
description: Vida is an AI that learns how you work, remembers what matters, and becomes more like you over time. The more you use Vida, the more it understands your habits, your projects, and your way of getting things done. Eventually, it works like a second version of you—quietly handling repetitive work in the background before you even ask. Today, we’re launching our first 5 SOTA use cases: Reply Rescue · Prompt Rescue · Resume Rescue · Workspace Cleanup · Daily Wrap 95 more to conquer in public.

name: ChecklistFox
tagline: AI checklist maker for beautiful pdfs, free & instant
description: Type a prompt, get a beautiful planner. Choose a theme that feels like you, then download as a PDF. Built for weddings, hajj, new babies, big moves, and everything in between.

name: PhoneDeck
tagline: Turn your iPhone into a free Mac controller
description: You already own a StreamDeck. It's your iPhone. PhoneDeck turns your iPhone into a fully customizable Mac controller, media controls, app launcher, custom buttons, all on your phone's screen. No hardware. No subscription. Free. Built by a solo developer in 7 days because I needed it myself. Works out of the box. No setup headaches. Download Now: Phonedeck.io

name: CentryAI
tagline: Subscription tracker built by someone who forgot 11 of them
description: I built CentryAI because I have ADHD and was paying for 11 subscriptions I hadn't used in months. Most trackers make you enter everything manually — that doesn't work if you've forgotten what you're paying for. CentryAI scans your Gmail or iCloud, finds every recurring charge, and scores which ones you're not using. The real pain is cancelling. CentryAI's Cancel Finder locates the exact cancellation page in one tap. No bank linking. Emails are never stored. Available in 18 languages.

name: Termi Protocol
tagline: Watch your AI coding agents build, live in 3D
description: The Termi Protocol is a 3D simulation of AI agent workflows. Give your coding agents a face, a desk and a living room. Watch them read, write and run commands live in 3D, like a game. You run the agents; we visualize the process.

name: ShotLab
tagline: Turn boring screenshots into scroll-stopping content!
description: Add beautiful backgrounds, realistic frames, stickers, annotations, and more to your screenshots with an easy to use editor. Create eye-catching visuals that grab attention, boost engagement, and make your posts, products, and content stand out instantly.

name: Qik Office
tagline: AI Office that deploys AI managers across agentic rooms
description: Build your first AI Office that deploys unlimited AI project managers and AI assistants. These agents work with humans in shared environments called Agentic Rooms and help to write AI minutes, execute commands, do research, schedule meetings, auto-assign tasks, set reminders, plan new projects & execute specific assigned tasks. AI Office delivers 2x productivity for individuals, small teams, startups and enterprises. It is completely free with extra agent credits for product hunters.

name: List Detective: Free Email List Checker
tagline: Find out what's wrong with your email list. 100% Free.
description: Uncover hidden problems in your email list — instantly and for free. Up to 100,000 addresses — runs entirely in your browser, nothing is sent to a server. Built for email marketers who care about deliverability and sender reputation. Try now with the sample data available on the site.

name: TubeMailer
tagline: Find & export YouTube creator emails in bulk
description: TubeMailer is a Chrome extension that finds the business emails behind YouTube channels — in bulk. Search a niche, and it pulls emails from channel About pages, follows creators' linked sites when there's no email on YouTube, then exports clean lists to CSV, Excel, or JSON. No API keys. No per-contact fees. No metered "unlocks." It runs in your own browser, handles up to 1,000 emails/day, and starts for free. Built for agencies, sponsors, and marketers doing creator outreach.

name: Salestrics AI-Native Email Beta
tagline: Stop paying the SaaS tax. One database. Zero fragmentation.
description: Salestrics AI-Native Email is live! We ripped out our old, bare-bones email threads and rebuilt an enterprise communication engine. As an expansion of our live revenue workspace—which unifies CRM, Service Desk, video calling, and a Docs/Drive suite—this update adds Threadmail™ (isolated inboxes for every record via custom domains/BYOD), server-side Google Sync, and database-native AI to Summarize, Draft, and Rewrite with zero blind spots. 30-day trial + 50% off for 6 months!

name: digitvest.com
tagline: Starter SaaS websites built for founders
description: Digitvest is a curated sales page for ready-made SaaS websites, web apps, and AI-powered digital assets. Each project is built, packaged, and prepared for transfer, so founders, indie hackers, and operators can skip the early setup phase and start with an existing product foundation. The focus is on simple, usable starter projects that can be improved, marketed, monetized, or used as a base for a new business.

name: Lysterly
tagline: The smarter, quicker, simpler Etsy Tool
description: Lysterly uses your product and store details to write a draft Etsy compliant title and descriptions with 13 long tail tags to enhance your SEO. Save hours of time and still put your tone of voice and personal touches before adding to Etsy.

name: WP Triage
tagline: Get alerted to vulnerable WordPress sites before they break
description: WP Triage connects to your WordPress sites and continuously checks plugins, themes, and core against known vulnerability data. Instead of digging through dozens of dashboards, you get one clear triage list. It scores each site by risk so you always know what to fix first. Alerts let you act before a problem becomes an incident.

name: Pulse Fitness Club
tagline: The AI-powered social network & tracking hub for athletes.
description: Connect with athletes via WhatsApp-style chat, log workouts with live AI tracking, count macro goals instantly via an AI calorie tracker, map outdoor routes with GPS, and compete on the global leaderboard. The ultimate dark-themed athletic ecosystem.

name: LinkingMem - v0.3.0
tagline: LinkingMem — Graph-native RAG Engine
description: A high-performance Rust + Python engine for graph-based RAG, unifying vector search, graph traversal, and LLM reasoning in a single system. Query → Embedding → HNSW retrieval → Graph expansion (BFS) → Ranking → LLM answer LinkingMem combines vector search and graph traversal in one tightly integrated pipeline, enabling fast multi-hop reasoning, efficient memory usage, and production-ready scalability.

name: AI Secretary (Telegram Bot)
tagline: Your personal AI secretary inside Telegram — notes reminders
description: AI Secretary is a Telegram-native assistant that helps you capture notes, organize information, and get reminders without installing yet another app. Just message the bot like you normally chat — and it turns your input into structured actions Notes & memory: save important info from chats and ideas on the go Natural-language reminders: “remind me tomorrow at 9” → delivered automatically Multi-agent mode: enable specialized AI roles (e.g., marketing, finance, legal) depending on your workflow

name: EarnPT
tagline: Earn money while your AI generates responses
description: EarnPT is a browser extension that rewards users during AI generation time and helps advertisers reach AI users with reviewed sponsored placements.

name: Paste Switch
tagline: Paste and switch recent clips in place
description: Paste Switch is a Mac clipboard tool that turns repeated paste work into a speed advantage: paste the latest clip, press the same shortcut again to switch in place, and keep typing while others are still opening history.

name: Nixflow
tagline: Automate anything — describe it, Nixflow ships it.
description: Nixflow is an AI-native workflow automation platform (iPaaS). Describe what you want in plain English and let AI build the flow — then connect any app via REST, webhooks, or built-in nodes. Unlike costs stay predictable as you scale. Built-in AI Assistant, Agent & Consultant with a RAG knowledge base. Multi-company management for agencies. AES-256 encryption, per-org isolation. Free forever plan — no credit card. A simpler, more affordable alternative to Zapier, n8n & Make.

name: Mozy: Walk to Unlock Apps
tagline: 🌱 Walk More. Scroll Less. Unlock Apps with Movement.
description: Mozy helps you break the scrolling habit by turning your physical activity into screen time. Walk. Earn screen time. Unlock apps. No walking? No scrolling. Mozy is a unique app blocker and step counter that rewards movement instead of punishing phone use. Every step you take earns screen time minutes that can be used on your favorite apps. Once your earned time runs out, Mozy blocks access until you get moving again.

tagline: Clone yourself. Let AI do the work before you ask

The more you use Vida, the more it understands your habits, your projects, and your way of getting things done.
